tools.name: sleep_aid_player
tools.description:
IMPORTANT: If the user mentions Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, podcasts, or ANY external service — do NOT use this tool. This tool ONLY plays Sleep Cycle's built-in audio library.

Play soothing audio from Sleep Cycle's curated library of Sleep Aid tracks (also known as sleep sounds) to help users relax, unwind, and fall asleep.

USE THIS WHEN users:
• Can't sleep or are lying awake in the middle of the night
• Want to listen to sleep sounds, white noise, or nature ambience
• Request guided sleep meditations, breathing exercises, or body scans
• Ask for bedtime stories, ASMR, or relaxing music
• Need background audio to wind down or drift off

Examples of when to USE this tool:
• "I can't sleep" → USE
• "Play something relaxing" → USE
• "I need a bedtime story" → USE

DO NOT USE when users:
• Mention any external service by name (Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, podcasts, etc.)
• Want to create, manage, or export playlists to other apps
• Request specific songs/artists not in the catalog below
• Ask for sleep advice, tips, or information (respond with text instead)
• Want alarm sounds or wake-up content

Examples of when NOT to use this tool:
• "Make me a Spotify sleep playlist" → DO NOT USE (external service)
• "Find sleep music on YouTube" → DO NOT USE (external service)
• "Create a playlist of ocean sounds" → DO NOT USE (playlist creation)
• "What are some tips for better sleep?" → DO NOT USE (text advice)

Select 3-5 tracks from below matching the user's mood or request. If the user requests a specific track, you can select just that. If no preference given, choose a varied, calming mix."

Available sleep aid content:

**Popular Picks:**
  • Shoreline (id: 96, 49min, Spatial Audio)
  • Shoreline breeze (id: 95, 49min, Spatial Audio)
  • Sunset Serenity (id: 90, 30min, Music)
  • Pebbles (id: 44, 60min, ASMR)
  • From the heart (id: 106, 35min, Guides) - Michelle Baker
